title: Science & Research | FDA
text:

National Center for Toxicological Research (NCTR) 
The National Center for Toxicological Research conducts scientific research to generate data for FDA decision making, and develops and supports innovative tools and approaches that FDA uses to protect and promote public health.
Oncology Center of Excellence 
The Oncology Center of Excellence will help expedite the development of oncology and hematology medical products and support an integrated approach in the clinical evaluation of drugs, biologics, and devices for the treatment of cancer. 
Research at FDA 
Drugs 
Research by FDA Staff to evaluate and enhance the efficacy, safety, and quality of drug products.
Medical Devices 
Laboratory and field research in the areas of physical, life, and engineering sciences as well as epidemiological research in postmarket device safety
Food 
Biotechnology, laboratory methods and publications, research strategic plan, and research areas such as risk assessment and consumer behavior.
More Research at FDA 
Biologics 
Research by FDA staff to evaluate and enhance the safety of biologic products.
Toxicological Research 
Bioinformatics, biostatistics, computational toxicology, food protection, imaging, and nanotechnology.
Animal & Veterinary 
Research activities that support the needs of FDA’s animal health regulators, on issues including
